Add codes to a condition code specification

Source: R/code_spec_api.R
add_codes.Rd

Returns a deep clone of spec with the specified codes appended to the given key(s). The original spec is never modified.

Usage

add_codes(spec, variable_type = c("condition", "outcome", "both"), ...)

Arguments

spec

A CodeSpec object.

variable_type

Which membership flag(s) to set for the new codes. "condition" sets condition = TRUE, outcome = FALSE; "outcome" sets condition = FALSE, outcome = TRUE; "both" (default) sets both to TRUE.

...

Named arguments where the name is a code-set key (e.g., dx_icd9) and the value is a character vector of codes to add.

Value

A modified deep clone of spec.

Examples

my_htn <- add_codes(
  spec_htn_v1,
  dx_icd10 = c("I119", "I130")
)
